issues.title: canonical circuit breaker remains the only current-live deployment blocker
issues.next_action: Keep breaker-first truth on /, /execution, /execution/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and current-state docs until release math actually improves.
issues.action: 先把 current-live blocker 語義切回 circuit breaker release math；在 breaker 未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主 blocker。 recent 50 需至少 15 勝，當前 5 勝，還差 10 勝；同時 streak 必須 < 50。

issues.title: recent canonical 250 rows remains a distribution pathology
issues.next_action: Keep drilling the pathological slice itself instead of diluting the root cause into generic leaderboard or venue discussions.
issues.action: 直接對 recent canonical rows 做 feature variance / distinct-count / target-path drill-down；維持 decision-quality guardrails，並檢查 calibration scope 是否仍被病態 slice 稀釋。 recent_window=500, alerts=['label_imbalance', 'regime_concentration', 'regime_shift'], win_rate=0.0120, delta_vs_full=-0.6122, dominant_regime=bull(93.20%), interpretation=distribution_pathology, avg_pnl=-0.0083, avg_quality=-0.2433, avg_dd_penalty=0.3215, spot_long_win_rate=0.0000, feature_diag=variance:8/56, frozen:0, compressed:8, expected_static:2, overlay_only:1, unexpected_frozen:0, distinct:10, null_heavy:10, tail_streak=10x0 since 2026-04-19 08:15:03.461206 -> 2026-04-19 09:39:46.015793, adverse_streak=264x0 since 2026-04-17 13:52:20.547302 -> 2026-04-18 13:43:25.809469, prev_win_rate=0.836, delta_vs_prev=-0.824, prev_quality=0.4009, quality_delta_vs_prev=-0.6442, prev_pnl=0.0072, pnl_delta_vs_prev=-0.0155, top_shift_examples=feat_eye(0.5223→-1.3563,Δσ=0.4905)/feat_vwap_dev(-0.2587→-0.1485,Δσ=0.4882)/feat_4h_bias200(6.174→8.7398,Δσ=0.4685), new_compressed=feat_vwap_dev, compressed_examples=feat_body(0.0/500)/feat_ear(0.0081/498)/feat_tongue(0.0097/500), expected_static_examples=feat_dxy[weekend_macro_market_closed]/feat_vix[weekend_macro_market_closed], overlay_only_examples=feat_scales_ssr[research_sparse_source], distinct_examples=feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0/0)/feat_chorus(0/0)/feat_fin_netflow(0/0), null_examples=feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0.0)/feat_chorus(0.0)/feat_fin_netflow(0.0), recent_examples=2026-04-19 09:03:25.590680:0:chop:-0.2314/2026-04-19 09:31:48.728103:0:chop:-0.2175/2026-04-19 09:39:46.015793:0:chop:-0.2046, adverse_examples=2026-04-18 13:00:00.000000:0:bull:-0.2342/2026-04-18 13:36:43.970223:0:bull:-0.2119/2026-04-18 13:43:25.809469:0:bull:-0.2137

issues.title: leaderboard comparable rows are back; keep the recent-window contract stable and cron-safe
issues.next_action: Keep /api/models/leaderboard and Strategy Lab aligned on latest bounded walk-forward plus the recent-two-year backtest policy; do not regress to placeholder-only or ambiguous backtest windows.
issues.action: Keep /api/models/leaderboard and Strategy Lab aligned on latest bounded walk-forward plus the recent-two-year backtest policy; do not regress to placeholder-only or ambiguous backtest windows.

issues.title: venue readiness is still unverified
issues.next_action: Keep per-venue blockers explicitly visible on Dashboard, /lab, and /execution/status until credentials, order ack lifecycle, and fill lifecycle each have runtime-backed proof.
issues.action: Keep per-venue blockers explicitly visible on Dashboard, /lab, and /execution/status until credentials, order ack lifecycle, and fill lifecycle each have runtime-backed proof.

issues.title: fin_netflow remains source_auth_blocked because COINGLASS_API_KEY is missing
issues.next_action: Configure COINGLASS_API_KEY, then keep heartbeat collection running until successful ETF-flow snapshots replace auth_missing rows and coverage starts to move.
issues.action: Configure COINGLASS_API_KEY, then keep heartbeat collection running until successful ETF-flow snapshots replace auth_missing rows and coverage starts to move.

issues.title: model stability still needs work (cv=0.6076, cv_std=0.1254, cv_worst=0.4450)
issues.action: 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。

issues.title: live predictor decision-quality contract is runtime-blocked by recent pathology, a toxic exact live lane, or a severe narrowed pathology lane
issues.action: 把 hb_predict_probe 納入每輪 heartbeat 驗證，對 exact live lane、當前 calibration scope 與 worst narrowed scope 做 root-cause drill-down；優先檢查 exact lane 是否仍是 ALLOW 但 canonical true-negative share 已偏高，並交叉比對 recent same-scope / narrowed-scope 4H shifts、scope selection、與 execution guardrail 是否只是正確地把壞 pocket 擋下。 live_scope=regime_label+regime_gate+entry_quality_label, regime=chop/CAUTION, label=D, issues.title: support-aware core_plus_macro_plus_all_4h patch must stay visible but reference-only
issues.action: Keep the same recommended_patch summary across /api/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and docs; do not promote it from reference-only until current-live exact support reaches the minimum rows.
